doctrine: Communication performs organizational work. Truth weight = decision rights + communication act + source lineage + currentness + permissions, context-aware. Never newest-document-wins. Never hierarchy-always-wins.

artifacts.title: Q2 kickoff all-hands
artifacts.decision_rights_basis: company strategy is Maya's owned domain; delivery sequencing is Jordan's

statements.speaker: Maya Chen
statements.text: Q2 priority is the three client programs: Northstar pilot, Harborlight implementation, Bluebird Phase 1. Depth over new logos this quarter.

statements.text: I'll sequence delivery so Northstar pilot prep and Harborlight onboarding don't collide in week 4.

statements.speaker: Priya Shah
statements.text: Bluebird Phase 1 scope is transcript summarization plus routing — I'll circulate the scope brief this week.

statements.speaker: Elena Torres
statements.text: Heads up: the shared ingestion pipeline is a dependency for both Harborlight and Bluebird. I'll publish a feasibility note.

statements.speaker: Maya Chen
statements.text: Marcus owns weekly client check-ins and executive follow-ups for now; we'll revisit load in a few weeks.

decisions.text: Q2 = depth on Northstar, Harborlight, Bluebird; no new-logo pushes

statements.text: Love it. Let's do it.

statements.speaker: Aisha Khan
statements.text: $18k is above the $15k threshold — policy needs a joint sign-off from Maya and me before purchase. I'll run the vendor check first.

statements.speaker: Maya Chen
statements.text: Right — run the check and we'll sign it together.
